review_text: Erika was absolutely wonderful with our two dogs. Daily photos, followed every instruction, and we came home to a spotless house. We'll definitely be booking again.
I was nervous about leaving my cat for two weeks but Erika sent videos every single day. My plants were thriving and the apartment was immaculate. 10 out of 10.
Punctual, communicative, and genuinely caring. Our dog has separation anxiety and Erika handled it with so much patience. Felt completely at ease the whole trip.
